title: GRAP Alias System
desc: Named shortcuts for GRAP patterns. Save/expand @name aliases with self-healing stale hwnd. Use anywhere a grap is accepted.
steps: Save by resolving window: grap save @notepad --find Notepad
Verify all aliases (stale hwnd auto-stripped): grap verify
Suffix appended after expansion: a11y click @chatgpt#Submit
Self-healing: stale hwnd is stripped on expand, re-resolved via domain/proc
author: claude
